ruleset_id.description: Lowercase ASCII package id; must equal the package directory name under plugins/coc-keeper/rulesets/.

schema_versions.description: Campaign/actor state schema versions this package supports (exact-match only, no migrations).

resources.description: Resource registry (contract §6): declared package-owned state such as HP/SAN/MP/Luck.

projected.description: When true, the kernel projects current_<key> into the runtime player-safe investigator surface. Optional; defaults to false when absent.

state_dirs.description: Package-owned campaign state directories (contract §6), placed directly under the campaign save/ directory. Optional; defaults to no package dirs when absent.

create_on_init.description: When true, the kernel creates save/<name> at campaign creation; otherwise the owning subsystem creates it lazily. Optional; defaults to false when absent.

boundary_terms.description: ASCII machine-facing terms (characteristics, resource labels) that table-language localization rewrites only on ASCII token boundaries (contract §6). Optional; defaults to an empty set when absent.
